phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the shops open
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ouvrent les boutiques ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR oo-VRAHN lay boo-TEEK
phrases.cultural_note: Les Docks is a converted warehouse with shops and restaurants along the harbor.

responses.english: The shops open at ten o'clock.
responses.local: Les boutiques ouvrent à dix heures.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un cinéma dans Les Docks ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn see-nay-MAH dans LAY DOKS
phrases.cultural_note: The complex includes a multi-screen cinema. Films are shown in original version with French subtitles.

responses.english: Yes, there's a cinema on the first floor.
responses.local: Oui, il y a un cinéma au premier étage.

phrases.text_local: Quelles options de restaurants y a-t-il ?
phrases.pronunciation: kelz op-SYONS duh res-to-RAN ee ah-TEEL
phrases.cultural_note: There are options from fast food to fine dining. Many have outdoor terraces overlooking the harbor.

responses.english: There are brasseries and restaurants with terrace views of the port.
responses.local: Il y a des brasseries et des restaurants avec terrasse sur le port.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what Les Docks is used for today
phrases.text_local: À quoi servent les Docks aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kwah SAIRV lay dohk oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Marseille's Les Docks is a vast 19th-century warehouse complex transformed into offices, shops and restaurants overlooking the Joliette port.

responses.phonetic: suh son day boo-ROH, boo-TEEK ay res-toh-RAHN.
responses.local: Ce sont des bureaux, boutiques et restaurants.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which bus stop is closest to Les Docks
phrases.text_local: Quel arrêt de bus est le plus proche des Docks ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ah-RAY duh boos ay luh ploo PROSH day dohk

responses.english: The Joliette stop, lines five and thirty-five.
responses.phonetic: lah-RAY zhoh-LYET, leen-yuh SANK ay TRAHNT-SANK.
responses.local: L'arrêt Joliette, ligne cinq et trente-cinq.
